description: Product Description Designed for those who value warmth, comfort, and style, these Ladies' 3 Pack Fairisle Viloft Socks are the perfect addition to your winter wardrobe. When the temperature drops, these thermal socks made from Viloft ensure you never have to choose between breathability and warmth. With their unique design, Viloft fibres create air pockets that enhance thermal insulation while also providing quick moisture-wicking and antibacterial properties. These socks offer a non-elastic top, making them an ideal choice for those with circulatory issues or swollen feet, fitting comfortably to the contours of your feet. Crafted from high-quality materials including heavy bulk acrylic yarn, these socks trap warm air, ensuring your feet stay cozy and warm. AVAILABLE IN 3 STYLES Each pack includes three vibrant colours—Blue, Pink, and Purple—so you can mix and match to suit your mood. Made from a blend of high-quality materials. INSULATING When winter hits, our Viloft based thermal socks offer unbeatable insulation. Designed with special fibres, they create air pockets that keep your feet warm and toasty, even in the coldest weather. MOISTURE WICKING Not only do these socks offer exceptional moisture-wicking and breathability, but they also provide antibacterial benefits. Made with Viloft, they draw moisture away from the skin faster, ensuring your feet stay dry and fresh all day long. When winter hits and temperatures drop, having the right thermal socks is essential. Made from a blend of Viloft, these socks offer exceptional warmth without compromising on breathability. Viloft is a special fibre with cross sections that create air pockets, enhancing thermal insulation while allowing for quick moisture wicking. This means your feet stay dry and fresh all day. Not only are they thermally efficient, but they are also non-elastic, making them ideal for those with swollen feet or circulatory problems. The looser top is designed to fit the contours of your feet comfortably. Crafted from heavy bulk acrylic yarn, these socks trap warm air, keeping your feet cosy and toasty. Viloft is naturally insulating and comfortable against the skin, making it an ideal material for winter socks. Viloft fibers create air pockets that enhance thermal insulation, allowing you to keep your feet warm without sacrificing breathability. This is particularly important during colder months when staying cozy is a priority. The quick moisture-wicking properties of Viloft help draw moisture away from the skin faster, keeping your feet dry and reducing the risk of bacterial growth. Our Ladies’ 3 Pack Fairisle Viloft Socks offer a delightful combination of warmth, comfort, and style, perfect for braving the winter chill. These socks feature unique Fairisle patterns that provide a vibrant and cozy look, making them a staple for your winter wardrobe. Meticulously designed, they incorporate Viloft fibers that create air pockets, offering excellent thermal insulation without compromising breathability. At Sock Snob, our motto is Smart. Creative. Socks. We are dedicated to offering the perfect socks for all activities and occasions. These thermal socks are a testament to our commitment to quality and comfort, ensuring your feet stay warm, dry, and comfortable throughout the day. Viloft’s quick moisture-wicking properties draw moisture away from the skin, reducing the risk of bacterial growth, making them an excellent choice for everyone, including those with swollen feet or circulatory issues. Available in one size (4-8 UK) and a cheerful mix of Blue, Pink, and Purple, our socks are also machine washable, making care a breeze. With a blend of acrylic, nylon, Viloft, and elastane, these socks promise softness and durability. We are incredibly proud to provide our customers with the best in imaginative and comfortable sock brands. Whether you’re facing a brisk winter walk or simply lounging at home, these socks won’t let you down!
